normal.description: Normal resting heart rate for adults

warning_low.description: Slightly low heart rate - monitor closely

warning_high.description: Elevated heart rate - possible stress or anxiety

critical_low.description: Dangerously low heart rate - possible bradycardia or sensor failure

critical_high.description: Dangerously high heart rate - possible tachycardia or panic

heart_rate.no_pulse_description: No pulse detected for extended period - possible cardiac arrest

warning.description: Low oxygen - possible hypoxemia, monitor closely

critical.description: Dangerously low oxygen - medical attention needed

heart_rate_variability.description: Sudden change of 30+ BPM within 5 seconds indicates potential cardiac event

drowsiness_correlation.description: Gradual drop of 15+ BPM over 30 seconds may indicate drowsiness
